prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS3 6.2L V8 (GM engine code: LS3 7.0L)** with a **Holley Dominator EFI ECU** and **FAST 102mm Big Mouth throttle body**, paired with a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission** and **McLeod RST twin-disc clutch** for precise power delivery.

Forced induction via **ProCharger F-1X supercharger (12 psi boost)** with a **Vortech air-to-water intercooler** and **ID1000x injectors**, supported by a **ATI Super Damper (ATI 917201)** to handle increased torque and prevent harmonic distortion.

Suspension overhaul with **QA1 REV Series coilovers (double adjustable, 2.5-inch struts)** and **BMR Suspension tubular control arms (front and rear)** for aggressive cornering, paired with a **Detroit Speed QUADRALINK rear suspension kit** to eliminate the factory four-link setup’s flex.

Exhaust system featuring **Stainless Works 1 7/8-inch headers** with **3-inch merge collectors**, a **Flowmaster Super 44 muffler (cat-back, dual exit)**, and **Vibrant Performance 3-inch resonated X-pipe** for a deep, aggressive tone without drone.
estetica: Body kit from **RK Sport**, including a **custom 2-inch front splitter**, **aggressive side skirts**, and a **carbon fiber ducktail spoiler** to reduce lift at high speeds while maintaining the Monte Carlo’s classic lines.

Wheels: **Forgeline GA3R 19x10 (front) and 19x11 (rear) in a 5x120.65mm bolt pattern**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear)** for maximum grip, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers** with **14-inch rotors** for stopping power.

Interior upgrades: **Recaro SRD-LW carbon fiber bucket seats** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and a **Rollcage Innovations bolt-in 8-point cage (chrome-moly, NHRA-certified)** for safety and rigidity, finished with **Dynamat Xtreme sound deadening** to reduce road noise.
